caseStudies.title: See what we have built
caseStudies.description: Projects that scaled. Companies that grew. Results that matter.
caseStudies.content1: We've delivered 200+ projects that generated real impact. Here's a sample of what we've done across finance, healthcare, retail, and tech.
caseStudies.content2: From a fintech startup that hit profitability in year two, to a healthcare platform serving 500K+ users, to an enterprise retailer that doubled revenue—these aren't hypotheticals. They're what happens when strategy meets great engineering.
